goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 16:30'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should leave after 16:30
The train should depart from london kings cross and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee
